findings.title: NVIDIA Reportedly Prepares RTX 5090 Price Hike Amid Rising GDDR7 Costs (maybe RTX 50 and PRO series as well)
I tracked EU GPU prices across 15 stores for 50+ days - RTX 5090 is the only card not dropping in price
NVFP4 Kimi2.6 and Kimi 2.5 released by Nvidia
findings.action: Update model aliases and test compatibility

findings.title: Extended Thinking being deprecated for supported models (Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6); Adaptive Thinking will be enforced by default
Replaced my $15/mo Wispr Flow subscription with a free local macOS app I built using Claude Code

I used Claude to make a free app/site that lets you see the statistical divide between Americans per state and all the relevant details on elected officials (who they're funded by, bills they voted on.. etc)
